title: Pebble's Cosmetic Render API
description: Renderer API to allow for certain cosmetic slots using Trinkets Polymer port to render client-side for people running it.
body:
Server + Client (optional) mod that allows for accessories equipped through Trinkets Polymer port to render the item equipped. Clients that installs the mod will be able to see each other's equipped cosmetics, while clients without the mod will still be able to join without interruption but they will not see the cosmetics.



Currently implemented:
- Hat slot
